zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite de Saint-Omer Dame de Clairmarais於1175年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉莫時，她的父親Guillaume de Saint-Omer IV25歲，母親Ida d'Avesnes18歲。她和Baudouin III DE CREQUY至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1237年在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯克雷基享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite de Saint-Omer Dame de Clairmarais于1175年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉莫时，她的父亲Guillaume de Saint-Omer IV25岁，母亲Ida d'Avesnes18岁。她和Baudouin III DE CREQUY至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1237年在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯克雷基享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite de Saint-Omer Dame de Clairmarais was born in 1175, in Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Guillaume de Saint-Omer IV, was 25 and her mother, Ida d'Avesnes, was 18. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Baudouin III DE CREQUY. She died in 1237, in Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite de Saint-Omer Dame de Clairmarais est née en 1175, à Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Guillaume de Saint-Omer IV, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Ida d'Avesnes, avait 18 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Baudouin III DE CREQUY. Elle est décédée en 1237, à Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite de Saint-Omer Dame de Clairmarais 1175 in Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume de Saint-Omer IV 25 und ihre Mutter Ida d'Avesnes 18. Sie hatte mit Baudouin III DE CREQUY mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1237 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Saint-Omer Dame de Clairmarais è nata il nel 1175 nel Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Guillaume de Saint-Omer IV, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Ida d'Avesnes, aveva 18 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Baudouin III DE CREQUY. Morì nel 1237, nel Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Saint-Omer Dame de Clairmaraisが1175年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスサイント-オマーで生まれた時，父Guillaume de Saint-Omer IVは25歳，母Ida d'Avesnesは18歳であった。彼女はBaudouin III DE CREQUYとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1237年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスクルeクイで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Saint-Omer Dame de Clairmarais(이)가 1175년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 세인트-머에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume de Saint-Omer IV(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ida d'Avesnes(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 Baudouin III DE CREQUY(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1237년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 크e크이에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Saint-Omer Dame de Clairmarais nasceu em 1175, em Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Guillaume de Saint-Omer IV, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Ida d'Avesnes, tinha 18 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Baudouin III DE CREQUY. Ela faleceu em 1237, em Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite de Saint-Omer Dame de Clairmarais родилась в 1175 г. в местности сеинт-омир, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Guillaume de Saint-Omer IV было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Ida d'Avesnes, 18. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Baudouin III DE CREQUY. Она умерла в 1237 г. в местности крeкуи, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite de Saint-Omer Dame de Clairmarais nació en 1175, en Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Guillaume de Saint-Omer IV, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Ida d'Avesnes, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Baudouin III DE CREQUY. Murió en 1237, en Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 62 años.
